case_title: CUMMINS LINDA J VS MOLINA MILAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY CUMMINS LINDA J AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA MILAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-1991, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-30-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUMMINS LINDA J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA MILAN $520.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $528.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
